content: Decision: Ship a read-only connector materialization layer before adding a heavy connector runtime. Owner: Agent Platform. Evidence: connector records should flow through the same SEOCHO index, ontology validation, graph shaping, and report path as normal documents.
title: Connector materialization layer

content: Support ticket: A production user wants Notion product decisions and Slack incident threads connected to graph answers. The user needs cited evidence, source URLs, and a quickstart that works before reading a long connector guide.
title: User asks for Notion and Slack evidence

content: Catalog asset: The orders table contains order_id, customer_id, status, total_amount, and created_at. It is owned by Data Platform and feeds support analytics. A future warehouse connector should preserve schema fields, owners, tags, and lineage as graph evidence.
title: Warehouse orders schema
